landing.headline: Will AI Replace
landing.subheadline: Get your personalized Disruption Risk Score in 3 minutes. Based on real market data, AI advancement trends, and your unique skill profile.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps to understand your career's future and build a defense strategy
landing.step1Desc: Share your CV or describe your role. Our AI analyzes your skills against 10,000+ job market data points.
landing.step2Desc: Receive a detailed breakdown of automation risk, AI replacement probability, and market demand trends for your role.
landing.step3Desc: Get a personalized 90-day action plan with specific skills to learn, certifications to pursue, and career pivots to consider.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: Real stories from professionals who took control of their career future
landing.pricingDesc: Get your risk score for free. Unlock the full action plan, career roadmap, and AI training arena with a one-time payment.
landing.finalCta: Don't Wait Until It's Too Late
landing.finalCtaDesc: The workforce is changing faster than ever. Know where you stand and take control of your career future.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready for AI-powered career tools.
pricing.faqFreeDesc: You get a career risk assessment, 3 blockers analysis, a teaser action plan, and 3 Job X-Ray analyses per month. No credit card required.
pricing.faqProDesc: Arena Pro gives you unlimited access to all AI-powered tools: Interview Simulator, Salary Negotiation Coach, CV/LinkedIn Optimizer, unlimited Job X-Ray, and more.
pricing.faqCancelDesc: Yes! Cancel anytime from your Stripe billing portal. You'll keep access until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faqBillingDesc: Arena Pro is billed monthly at $10/month via Stripe. Your subscription renews automatically unless you cancel.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or need support? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.responseTimeDesc: Usually within 24 hours on business days
contact.successDesc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
